channel.title: Code on MonkeMan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Code on MonkeMan's Blog

item.title: AutoCodeRover: Autonomous Program Improvement
item.description: Paper Title: AutoCodeRover: Autonomous Program Improvement Link to Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.05427 Date: 8. April 2024 Paper Type: LLM, Code-generation Short Abstract: LLMs have already been extensively used in easing the workload of developers. In this paper the authors proposed AutoCodeRover a framework to automatically solve GitHub issues. In this framework LLMs are combined with code search algorithm’s. They use Abstract syntax trees instead of rare files. 1. Introduction Automating software developing has for a long time been a vision of engineers.
